---
title: "Phase VII — Computational Reconstruction"
---

{{< include ../../research/phase_07_compute/README.md >}}

## Experiment results (frozen)

Results from `make smoke` (toy simulations with costs). Re-run locally to refresh.

### EXP-03 — Mean reversion

```json
{{< include ../../experiments/03_mean_reversion/results/summary.json >}}
```

### EXP-04 — Almgren–Chriss execution edge

```json
{{< include ../../experiments/04_almgren_chriss/results/summary.json >}}
```

### EXP-05 — Vol target / banded leverage

```json
{{< include ../../experiments/05_vol_target_kelly/results/summary.json >}}
```

### EXP-07 — Multi-signal ensemble

```json
{{< include ../../experiments/07_multi_signal/results/summary.json >}}
```

::: {.callout-warning}
Negative or extreme Sharpe values in toys indicate model misspecification or cost drag—not Medallion performance claims.
:::
